title: Angel Hair Pasta with Fresh Tomato Sauce
ingredients: Ripe tomatoes (about 8-10 Roma, 4 large red) peeled, seeded and chopped
1 small white onion or 3 scallions, minced
instructions: Combine tomatoes, herbs, olive oil and lemon juice. Mix well. Mix ½ of sauce in with pasta and top pasta with remaining sauce. Top with freshly grated Parmesan cheese.
This is a family favorite in the summertime when freshly harvested tomatoes are at their peak.
